title: Sabo Reveals the Truth of the Levely
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Crocodile, Buggy, York, Unknown person #5, Law as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rest easy, friend! We'll take care of you, as a fellow pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: AS A P- PIRATE.?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get it? One of the empersors is taking you under his wing. The Bombastic clown himself! Buggy-sama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's on another level.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two-bit pirates you've met before aren't fit to lick his boots!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Never forget this moment! You're standing face to face with a living legend!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Yeaah! It's buggy- Sama in the flesh!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Buggy in the flesh!!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Buggy in the flesh!!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Buggy in the flesh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry to interrupt you, barley-sama! You're so fresh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That makes me sound like some kind of cereal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We've finished it, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: A ship worthy of cross Guild!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: leave the ship to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've got some talented shipwrights under me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Making you the figurehead was the obvious choice, Chairman buggy!:)

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: I think it turned out great!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: K'TAAA AAM!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You expect us to use this thing...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Let's take this to the meeting room.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's hear it for the greatest ship ever!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You guys really outdid your- selves!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: In the 'Meeting' room...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: public awareness of gross guild is growing as planned.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Navy is starting to understand the threat we pose...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: PLEASE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: JUST KILL ME ALREADY...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to have unparalleled influence to form our utopia...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THE PAIN...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and become a strong military state... but before all that we need to establish...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Our overwhelming power, right...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is wrong... this isn't how I wanted my life to go.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And to do that, we've got to find a way to gather an enormous amount of...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WEALTH. YOU'RE SAYING WE NEED WEALTH AND POWER. RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I... I Mmay BE OUT OF LINE HERE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A-AND I-I KNOW YOU MAY DO AWAY WITH ME FOR SAYING THIS, BUT...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can you call yourself pirates with schemes like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What did this cockroach just say...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're doing it all back- wards!!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
